motion: Merge PR #26: Epic 3 — Model Gateway / Judge-Router to main (Round 3 — post-fix verification)

fixes.description: Replace equality with errors.Is for context sentinels in FallbackError.Unwrap — pe.Err == context.Canceled should be errors.Is(pe.Err, context.Canceled), same for DeadlineExceeded. Add wrapped-error test case.

Reword stale T5 SSRF deferral comment — replace 'Full host allowlist and private CIDR blocking deferred to config loading (T5)' with text reflecting current scope (CIDR blocking not implemented, BaseURL is operator-controlled, WithBaseURL rejects non-http/https)
Add doc comment to ErrCostTrackerFull marking it as reserved for capacity-limited CostTracker implementations — InMemoryCostTracker does not return this error

Align Ollama pricing keys to bare model names (llama3, codellama) to match what CompletionResponse.Model carries after OllamaAdapter prefix stripping, OR add inline YAML comments and doc note in providers/ollama.go explaining the namespace difference

pr_amendments: Add 'Pre-merge fixes (Round 3 council)' section listing the four corrections applied after the final council review
